name: schema-py-ddl-source-of-truth
tags: schema DDL sqlite source of truth tests factories migrate init setup
body:
src/db/schema.py is the canonical DDL owner for all SQLite tables in claude-hooks.

Tables covered: memories, open_tasks, task_events, task_edges, mcp_tool_hints, hook_logs, test_runs.
Each table has a DDL constant (MEMORIES_DDL, OPEN_TASKS_DDL, etc.) + a migrate_*_db(conn) function.

Usage:
- Tests: import DDL constants via tests/fixtures/db_factories.py factory functions
- Setup: `uv run python -m scripts.init_db` — one-time, idempotent
- Prod connect-time code (_ensure_db, _SCHEMA, etc.) NOT replaced — stays as-is

Rule: schema changes go in schema.py first. Tests get them automatically via factories.
